title: Quasi-nilpotent sets in semigroups
journal: Proceedings of the American Mathematical Society
abstract:
In a compact semigroup 

  
    S
    S
  

 with zero 

  
    0
    0
  

, a subset 

  
    A
    A
  

 of 

  
    S
    S
  

 is called quasi-nilpotent if the closed semigroup generated by 

  
    A
    A
  

 contains 

  
    0
    0
  

. A probability measure 

  
    μ
    \mu
  

 on 

  
    S
    S

      (
      
        
          μ
          n

    ({\mu ^n})

    0
    0

    S
    S

    S
